title: Teacher Login via Mobile + U-DISE and U-DISE-Filtered Data Across All Pages

requirements.summary: Implement teacher login using mobile number and U-DISE number as credentials with session storage of U-DISE
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher tab on LoginPage shows both a 'Mobile Number' field and a 'U-DISE Number' field.
Login succeeds only when the mobile number and U-DISE number match a stored TeacherLogin record.
On successful teacher login, the session stores the teacher's U-DISE number.
Invalid combinations show a clear error message.
After login, the teacher is routed to the Home page dashboard.

file_operations.description: Modify the Teacher tab form to include both mobile number and U-DISE number input fields. Update validation logic to check both fields against stored TeacherLogin records. On successful authentication, store the teacher's U-DISE number in the AuthContext session alongside role and mobile. Add error message display for invalid credential combinations.

Extend the Session type to include an optional udise field. Update login function to accept and store udise parameter. Ensure sessionStorage persistence includes the udise field. Update logout to clear udise from session.

requirements.summary: Filter Home page stats and progress bar by logged-in teacher's U-DISE number
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only counts and stats for students/results belonging to their U-DISE number.
Admin role continues to see aggregated data across all schools.
The filtering uses the U-DISE from the teacher's auth session.

file_operations.description: Read the teacher's U-DISE from session via AuthContext. When teacher role is active, filter students and results arrays by matching school UDISE to session udise before computing stats. Keep admin logic unchanged (aggregated across all schools). Update total students, results entered, and results pending calculations to respect the teacher U-DISE filter.

requirements.summary: Filter School Info page to show only teacher's U-DISE school and hide add/edit/delete actions for teacher role
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only the single school row whose UDISE matches their session U-DISE.
Add/Edit/Delete buttons are hidden for teacher role on this page.
Admin role sees all schools with full CRUD controls.

file_operations.description: Read teacher's U-DISE from session via AuthContext. Filter the schools array to show only the school matching session udise when role is teacher. Conditionally render Add School button and Edit/Delete action buttons only when role is admin. Admin role continues to see all schools unfiltered.

requirements.summary: Filter Teacher Info page to show only teachers matching logged-in teacher's U-DISE
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only teacher entries with their own U-DISE number.
Admin role sees all teacher records.
The UDISE filter is applied automatically on page load from the session.

file_operations.description: Read teacher's U-DISE from session via AuthContext. When role is teacher, filter teachers array by cross-referencing each teacher's schoolId with schools to match session udise. Admin role sees all teacher records unfiltered. Apply filter automatically on component mount using session udise.

requirements.summary: Filter Student Info page by teacher's U-DISE and pre-fill/lock U-DISE field for teacher role
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only students belonging to their U-DISE school.
When a teacher adds a student, the U-DISE field is pre-populated and read-only.
Admin role sees and can manage all students.

file_operations.description: Read teacher's U-DISE from session via AuthContext. Filter students array by matching student schoolId to schools with session udise for teacher role. In the add/edit form, when role is teacher, pre-fill the UDISE input with session udise and make it disabled/read-only. Admin role sees all students and can freely edit UDISE field.

requirements.summary: Filter Enter Results page student list by teacher's U-DISE
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role's student search list is scoped to their U-DISE.
Admin role sees all students in the list.
Results entered by a teacher are correctly associated with their school's U-DISE.

file_operations.description: Read teacher's U-DISE from session via AuthContext. Filter the students array shown in the student list/search by matching student schoolId to schools with session udise when role is teacher. Admin role sees all students unfiltered. Ensure results entered reference the correct school UDISE via student's schoolId.

requirements.summary: Pre-fill and lock U-DISE filter on Progress Report page for teacher role
acceptanceCriteria: U-DISE input on the Progress Report page is pre-filled with the teacher's U-DISE and is read-only for teacher role.
Admin role can freely type any U-DISE.
Progress report results are scoped correctly based on the U-DISE.

file_operations.description: Read teacher's U-DISE from session via AuthContext. When role is teacher, pre-fill the UDISE input field with session udise on component mount and make it disabled/read-only. Admin role can freely enter any UDISE. Progress report filtering logic already uses the UDISE input value; no additional filter changes needed.

requirements.summary: Pre-fill and lock U-DISE filter on Student Result Print page for teacher role
acceptanceCriteria: U-DISE input on the Student Result Print page is pre-filled with the teacher's U-DISE and is read-only for teacher role.
Admin role can freely type any U-DISE.
Print output shows only data for the teacher's school.

file_operations.description: Read teacher's U-DISE from session via AuthContext. When role is teacher, pre-fill the UDISE input field with session udise on component mount and make it disabled/read-only. Admin role can freely enter any UDISE. Print output already respects the UDISE input value for filtering; no additional changes needed.

requirements.summary: Ensure sidebar navigation includes all required pages for teacher role
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role can see and navigate to: Home, School Info, Teacher Info, Student Info, Enter Results, Progress Report, and Student Result Print.
No page is blocked or hidden from the teacher role except admin-only management pages.
Navigation items correctly label pages in both English and Marathi where applicable.

file_operations.description: Review and update the navigation items array to ensure teacher role has access to: Home, School Info, Teacher Info, Student Info, Enter Results, Progress Report, and Student Result Print. Remove any role guards blocking these pages for teacher. Keep Teacher Manage page restricted to admin only. Verify navigation labels are present in both English and Marathi as applicable.
